tracks.meaning: a sign, character, or object that represents or stands for something else, especially an idea or quality
a written character or sign used to represent a mathematical operation, quantity, or concept
a graphic representation or icon used in computing interfaces to represent files, functions, or applications
something that represents an unconscious idea, desire, or feeling in dreams or the mind
a sign, object, or image used to represent sacred, spiritual, or religious concepts and meanings
in linguistics and philosophy, a mark or sign that has an arbitrary relationship to the thing it represents
a one or two-letter abbreviation representing a chemical element on the periodic table
a trademark, logo, or distinctive mark used to identify and protect intellectual property
a token or coin that represents a certain value in a monetary or exchange system
a written character or notation used to represent musical notes, rests, or performance instructions
a small gift, gesture, or token that shows appreciation, love, or acknowledgment of something
an emblem, badge, or recognizable object that signifies membership, rank, or allegiance to a group
